technicalSkills.label: Product
technicalSkills.description: Roadmap planning, user research and A/B testing for early-stage mobile features.

technicalSkills.label: Tools
technicalSkills.description: JIRA for backlog management, Figma for prototyping, Mixpanel for product analytics.

experience.description: Junior Product Manager on a consumer mobile product, working with a 3-person delivery squad.
experience.title: Junior Product Manager
tasks: Define and groom the mobile roadmap with engineering and design.
Run weekly user research sessions and translate insights into prioritised backlog items.
Coordinate release planning across product, design and engineering.
achievements: Launched mobile app v2 with a 30% retention uplift.
Reduced time-to-decision on roadmap proposals from 3 weeks to 5 days.
